title: selaginella heterodonton
intro: Selaginella heterodonton, also known as spikemoss, is a species of evergreen, perennial plant in the genus Selaginella. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella heterodonton include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory conditions, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
